input.question: I found more than one plausible runner here. Which command should I use?

options.label: npm test
options.description: Use the default npm test script

text: Other: pnpm exec playwright test tests/import.spec.ts

[Requirements]

Inputs:         Scope filter: tests/import.spec.ts
